description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square black base designed for stability on urban surfaces such as roads and sidewalks. The cone features two white reflective stripes around its upper section, both of which show signs of dirt and wear, indicating outdoor use. The body of the cone is made of flexible, semi-soft plastic or rubber, and is slightly scuffed and marked, suggesting it has been handled or moved frequently. The tip of the cone is rounded and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base appears to be made of a heavier, more durable material, likely rubber, to prevent tipping and provide grip on various surfaces. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a wide, black, stable base. The cone shows visible dirt and scuff marks, indicating frequent outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white reflective stripes and a slightly dirty, wide black base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cone's tall, tapered shape and the scuffed, stable black base.
description_view_2: Another side view with visible dirt on the reflective stripes and a clear view of the cone's flexible body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the cleanest side of the cone, with the orange body and black base clearly visible.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two white reflective stripes encircle the upper third of the cone, each approximately 8 cm wide, spaced apart, and showing visible dirt.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, square, and black, made of thick, heavy rubber for stability, with a slightly textured surface for grip.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The cone appears worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks and faded reflective stripes, indicating frequent outdoor use.
